name: Alchemist Spells
description:
When you reach an Artificer level specified in the Alchemist Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

Alchemist Spells table:
- Artificer Level 3: Healing Word, Ray of Sickness
- Artificer Level 5: Flaming Sphere, Melf's Acid Arrow
- Artificer Level 9: Gaseous Form, Mass Healing Word
- Artificer Level 13: Death Ward, Vitriolic Sphere
- Artificer Level 17: Cloudkill, Raise Dead
